title: "Arcade1Up Ms. PAC-MAN Classic SE Arcade Game Machine � 1.22 Meter Cabinet, 13 Classic Video Games, 39.62 cm IPS Display, Easy Assembly, Perfect for At-Home Gaming"
features: "13 Classic Arcade Games in One Machine � Relive the golden age of gaming with iconic titles like Ms. PAC-MAN, GALAGA, DIG DUG, MAPPY, GALAXIAN, and more�perfect for solo play or competitive fun with friends and family."

"Authentic Arcade Feel with Premium Features � Equipped with a vibrant 39.62 cm (15.6"") IPS display for crisp visuals, dual stereo speakers for immersive sound, and real arcade-style joystick & buttons for that true retro gaming experience."
Compete Globally with Online WiFi Leaderboards � Challenge players worldwide by uploading your high scores and see where you rank�the ultimate test for PAC-MAN and GALAGA champions!

"Space-Saving Design with Adjustable Height � Compact 1.22-meter (48-inch) cabinet (riser sold separately) fits perfectly in game rooms, basements, or living spaces. Assembled dimensions: 47.24 cm W x 44.07 cm D x 115.32 cm H."

"Safe, Sturdy & Easy to Assemble � Includes anti-tip strap for stability, plug covers for a clean look, adjustable volume control, and simple setup�weighs just 17.24 kg (38 lbs) for manageable placement."
